Interface ReactiveCouchbaseRepository<T,ID>

All Superinterfaces:
ReactiveCrudRepository<T,ID>, ReactiveSortingRepository<T,ID>, Repository<T,ID>
All Known Implementing Classes:
SimpleReactiveCouchbaseRepository
@NoRepositoryBean public interface ReactiveCouchbaseRepository<T,ID> extends ReactiveSortingRepository<T,ID>, ReactiveCrudRepository<T,ID>
Couchbase-specific ReactiveSortingRepository implementation.
Since:
3.0
Author:
Subhashni Balakrishnan, Michael Reiche
